description.ko: 균열된 사막 지면부터 울창한 숲의 캐노피, 험준한 산맥의 능선에 이르기까지 지구의 다양한 지질학적 표면을 고해상도로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A high-resolution exploration of Earth's diverse geological surfaces, from cracked desert floors to lush forest canopies and jagged mountain ridges.

prompt: Macro aerial photography of diverse Earth textures, featuring cracked salt flats, swirling river deltas, deep canyon strata, and dense emerald moss, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, satellite perspective, cinematic lighting, intricate geological details.
